speaker: Diederich
text: Hmm... I see... *paw prints*

speaker: Narration
text:
*As he writes our names on a list,*
Professor Derich looks us over as we sit on the ground after the tournament.

speaker: Diederich
text: Nice work! Now I have a good idea of the extent of your skills.

speaker: Diederich
text: Hm? *paw prints*

speaker: Diederich
text: Oh... You don’t know? Theo is....

speaker: Diederich
text: Wait, but… *paw prints*

speaker: Diederich
text: ...Fine, fine.

speaker: Diederich
text: That's enough!! Stop!
Professor Diderich rushes over to Grant.

speaker: Diederich
text: Oi, let me see your stomach!

speaker: Narration
text: *When Professor Derich lifts Grant's body, some pieces of wood tumble off of him.*

speaker: Diederich
text: ...Was that cracking sound his armor breaking?

speaker: Diederich
text: Hey, are you okay? Can you talk?

speaker: Diederich
text: ...You're a sturdy guy.

speaker: Professor Derich
text: *sighs* with relief

speaker: Theo!!
text: Were you tryin’ to kill him?!

speaker: Diederich
text: That's not the problem! This is just supposed to be trainin'!!

speaker: Diederich
text: I wasn’t talkin’ about doin’ more damage than necessary! You gotta control yourself!

speaker: Diederich
text: Oi... don't get cocky, your majesty... You might be the strongest among the students, but you're nothin' compared to me.

speaker: Diederich
text: You want me to make it clear who's on top right now?

speaker: Diederich
text: This isn't about you now. I need to teach this guy a lesson.

speaker: Diederich
text:
I’ve been waiting for you.

*(paw prints)*

speaker: Diederich
text: ...Fine. Since you're so worked up about it...

speaker: Diederich
text: Even though you two agreed... I still shouldn’t have allowed it. I take responsibility for that.
